steps.title: Isolate the variable term
steps.content: Starting from $$11x+50=160,$$ subtract 50 on both sides to isolate the variable term.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: This gives $$11x=110.$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice C, $11x = 110$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so C is correct.
